# Sivoro Microfluidics

> The first self-assembling, optogenetically controlled microfluidic platform using engineered *Neurospora crassa*. No cleanroom required.

Sivoro is an early-stage biotech company building living microfluidic chips. Channels are grown by an engineered fungus (*N. crassa*) rather than fabricated by photolithography. Flow is controlled by blue light (450 nm) via an optogenetic septal pore valve. Founded 2026, based in Ann Arbor, Michigan. Raising a $1.5M seed round at $6M pre-money valuation.

## Key Facts

- **Technology:** Metabolically orthogonal *N. crassa* chassis (xylose-only) + LOV2-Jα-HEX1 optogenetic valve + H-tree scaffold (10×10 mm, 16 ports, 4 levels)
- **Stage:** Pre-seed. Computational phases 100% complete (metabolic modeling, KO screen, structural prediction, scaffold design). Wet-lab validation is the next milestone.
- **IP:** 5 patent families, provisional draft complete, ready to file within 30 days of legal engagement
- **Competitive advantages:** No cleanroom, <$1 per device (post-strain), self-clearing channels via hyphal turnover, built-in optogenetic valves vs external pneumatics
- **Round:** Seed · $1.5M · Pre-money $6M · Post-money $7.5M · 18-month runway
- **Goal:** Prototype + first customer (academic beta site, LOI from 3 labs by M12)
- **Contact:** hello@sivoro.bio · investors@sivoro.bio · partners@sivoro.bio

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://sivoro.bio/): Full narrative overview — problem, solution, comparison table, three IP layers, validation progress, competitive quadrant, traction numbers, investor CTA
- [Technology](https://sivoro.bio/technology): Deep-dive into the three IP layers — metabolic orthogonality (iJDZ836, 9,976 KO pairs), optogenetic septal pore valve mechanism (LOV2-Jα-HEX1 + SPA1-ePDZ), H-tree chip scaffold (13–20 µm channels, 16 ports)
- [Science](https://sivoro.bio/science): Computational validation data — iJDZ836 genome-scale model stats, KO screen methodology and phenotype tiers, ColabFold pLDDT scores (91 & 88), 12-month wet-lab milestone plan with success metrics
- [Products](https://sivoro.bio/products): Four-product roadmap — Sivoro Start (academic kit, $2,500/kit, 70% GM), Sivoro Organ (pharma platform, $50k–150k, 60% GM), Sivoro License (IP royalties, 5–10%, 90% GM), Sivoro Dx (diagnostic, per-assay, 2029+)
- [Team](https://sivoro.bio/team): Founder Michael McKenna (computational biology, metabolic modeling, microfluidics — 7,600+ lines Python, 9,976 KO pairs screened, 2 validated optogenetic constructs). Open roles: Fungal Geneticist (part-time/academic), Microfluidics Engineer (first hire post-seed), Protein Biochemist (consultant)
- [Investors](https://sivoro.bio/investors): Full investment details — $1.5M seed at $6M pre-money, use-of-funds breakdown ($400k wet-lab, $300k strain construction, $250k founder ops, $200k protein validation, $150k chip prototyping, $100k IP legal, $100k contingency), 12-month milestones, key risk mitigations, pitch deck download
- [Partners](https://sivoro.bio/partners): Collaboration models — Beta Testing Program (free kits to academic labs), Co-Development (custom strains), Joint Publications (shared authorship), SBIR Partnership (grant collaboration). Contact: partners@sivoro.bio
- [Contact](https://sivoro.bio/contact): Direct contact by inquiry type — investors@sivoro.bio, partners@sivoro.bio, press@sivoro.bio, jobs@sivoro.bio, hello@sivoro.bio

## Technology Summary

### Layer 1 — Chassis
Metabolically orthogonal *N. crassa* engineered to metabolize xylose only. Six-gene knockout validated *in silico* from 9,976 combinations screened using iJDZ836 genome-scale metabolic model. Recommended Tier 1 chassis achieves ~30% WT xylose growth (doubling time ~2.7 hr). IP: composition of matter + screening method (HIGH patentability).

### Layer 2 — Valve
Optogenetic septal pore valve using LOV2-Jα-HEX1 fusion (Component A, 36.9 kDa, pLDDT 91) + SPA1-ePDZ anchor (Component B, 39.4 kDa, pLDDT 88). Blue light (450 nm) triggers 100× dynamic range pore closure. Fail-safe open — thermal reversion automatically reopens without input. IP: constructs + method of flow control (HIGH).

### Layer 3 — Scaffold
H-tree topology (10×10 mm, 4 levels, 16 reagent ports + central chow reservoir). Equal path length from all ports to center ensures simultaneous, pressure-balanced reagent delivery. Main channels 20 µm (4–8 hyphae), branch channels 13–17 µm (2–3 hyphae, valve control zone). Compatible with SU-8/PDMS or direct printing. IP: fungal-specific channel geometry (MED) + integrated living device (HIGH).

## Traction

- 9,976 knockout pairs screened in silico
- 2 validated optogenetic constructs (sequence + structure)
- pLDDT 91 (LOV2 domain), pLDDT 88 (HEX1 domain) — ColabFold, high confidence
- 5 patent families, provisional draft complete
- 7,600+ lines of Python modeling code
- Provisional patent draft complete, ready to file within 30 days of legal engagement
